title: 10 Herbal Creams For Ringworm
description: Thymus vulgaris creams contains thymol and carvacrol, two active constituents that have antifungal properties. These properties help to combat the fungal infection that causes ringworm. Thymol inhibits the growth of the fungus by interfering with its cell membrane, while carvacrol has antiseptic and antibacterial effects that prevent the spread of infection. Thymus vulgaris creams also have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce redness and itching associated with ringw...
